sigWerErrors.reason: '先' means 'first' (indicating sequence), while '想' means 'want' (indicating desire). This changes the meaning of the sentence from 'I will first tell you my email address' to 'I want to tell you my email address', which alters the intent but does not make the sentence incoherent.
